category_sources: Official Fairwinds Polaris docs call Polaris an open source policy engine for Kubernetes.
source_facts.description says validation of best practices in Kubernetes clusters.
display_name_sources: Official Fairwinds page and docs use Polaris.
docs_sources: Official Fairwinds Polaris documentation is hosted at polaris.docs.fairwinds.com.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/FairwindsOps/polaris, so repo enrichment is intentionally not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official docs describe policy-as-code, CLI, dashboard, admission controller, validation, and remediation modes.
